headline: Rocket Lab Is One of the Most Volatile Stocks Ever. This ETF Turns That Wild Ride Into a Weekly Paycheck
summary: Rocket Lab (NASDAQ:RKLB) has gained 311% over the past year, driven by contract wins, launch cadence milestones, and surging retail enthusiasm for the space sector. That kind of movement is a nightmare for investors trying to time entries, but a goldmine for anyone collecting options premiums. A brand-new ETF called the Tuttle Capital Space Industry ... Rocket Lab Is One of the Most Volatile Stocks Ever. This ETF Turns That Wild Ride Into a Weekly Paycheck
